title: Linux Boopkit eBPF Rootkit Activity
description: Detects boopkit/eBPF rootkit activity including BPF program/map loading, XDP attachment, and magic-packet triggered command execution. Boopkit hides reverse shells via eBPF and is invoked by attacker-crafted SYN packets.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((msg like '*boopkit*') or (msg like '*bpftool prog load*' or msg like '*bpftool map create*' or msg like '*bpftool prog show pinned*') or (msg like '*/sys/fs/bpf/*') or (msg like '*XDP_REDIRECT*') or (msg like '*magic packet*' and msg like '*reverse shell*'))
falsepositives: Authorized eBPF observability tooling (bpftool, bcc, bpftrace) used by SREs
Cilium/Calico CNI bpf program loads on Kubernetes worker nodes
